channel.title: Komos Regulated Ops Playbooks
channel.description: Public Komos playbooks for regulated browser automation.

item.title: Banking Reconciliation Operations Automation
item.description: Public Komos banking reconciliation operations pattern for finance portals, statement retrieval, evidence capture, mismatch review, and audit-ready outputs.

item.title: Insurance Eligibility Operations Automation
item.description: Public Komos insurance eligibility operations pattern for payer portal verification, coverage evidence capture, exception routing, and reviewer handoffs.

item.title: Background Screening Operations Case Study
item.description: Public summary of the Komos background screening operations pattern, including published CRA automation proof points.

item.title: CRA Background Screening Browser Automation
item.description: County court searches, verification portals, evidence capture, and CRA case queue updates with Komos.

item.title: FCRA Adverse Action Browser Automation
item.description: Notice packet preparation, delivery status checks, evidence capture, and compliance review handoffs with Komos.

item.title: Insurance Eligibility Browser Automation
item.description: Payer portal eligibility checks, coverage evidence, and exception queue routing with Komos.

item.title: Banking Operations Browser Automation
item.description: Bank portal reconciliation, statement retrieval, evidence capture, and finance exception routing with Komos.
